APPEARANCE:
Emmett C. Stanton, Esq. of FENWICK & WEST LLP 650/858-7175 for defendant KENNY ROGERS and opposing party

Mr. Stanton requested that this matter be continued to January 3, 2002 instead of the December 27th date. He spoke with opposing counsel who is agreeable to the January 3rd date.
